title: Paul Curran Appointed President and Publisher of AJC
summary: Cox Enterprises appoints Paul Curran to lead The Atlanta Journal-Constitution, focusing on sustaining journalism and digital growth.

title: Missouri Football Player Ahmad Hardy Shot at Concert
summary: Ahmad Hardy, a Missouri running back, was shot at a concert in Mississippi but is in stable condition after surgery.

title: Trump Seeks China's Help on Iran Ceasefire
summary: President Trump will urge China to pressure Iran into a deal to end the war during his upcoming visit to Beijing.

title: Hayden Panettiere Recounts Disturbing Incident in Memoir
summary: Hayden Panettiere details an unsettling experience in her memoir, involving an 'undressed' man when she was 18.

title: GM Lays Off IT Workers to Hire AI Specialists

title: Linux Faces Second Severe Vulnerability in Weeks

title: Android and iPhone Texts to Get End-to-End Encryption

title: 2026 NFL Schedule Release Information

title: Hantavirus Outbreak: NC Resident Quarantined

title: Supreme Court Extends Abortion Pill Access
summary: The Supreme Court allows full access to the abortion pill mifepristone, including by mail, for at least three more days.

title: Zelenskyy's Former Chief of Staff Targeted in Corruption Probe
